title: The Clockwork Covenant
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced toymaker in a city where magic is powered by clockwork must build a device that can rewind time itself before a celestial alignment cracks the realm apart.
long_description: A disgraced toymaker in a city where magic is powered by clockwork must build a device that can rewind time itself before a celestial alignment cracks the realm apart.
